<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
            <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #vuetify-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="vuetify-logo">
    <title>Vuetify</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M6.312 12.564 12.636 1.2H0l6.312 11.364ZM14.94 1.2 7.464 14.64 12 22.8 24 1.2h-9.06Zm4.98 2.4L12 17.856l-1.788-3.216L16.344 3.6h3.576ZM6.312 7.62 4.08 3.6h4.476L6.312 7.62Z" />
    </g>
</svg>
